title: Config validation → missing env var causes fast failure
evidence: ✓ tests/unit/tc-017.test.ts (3 tests) 18ms ✓ TC-017: missing SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET → slack-relay config throws ZodError ✓ TC-017: missing DATABASE_URL → control-plane config throws ZodError ✓ TC-017: ZodError message identifies the missing field name Full suite: 363/364 tests passed (1 pre-existing TC-015 failure unrelated to TC-017). Fast failure confirmed: Zod throws ZodError with `issues[].path[0]` identifying the missing field name.
